englishDefinitions: To enter a building or place by force or illegally.
To interrupt a conversation or activity suddenly.
To make something new work properly through initial use or adjustment.
persianTranslation: با زور وارد شدن / دزدی کردن
examples: Someone tried to break in through the back door.
Sorry to break in, but I have an urgent question.
You need to break in new shoes before wearing them all day.
